column6:
Ambient Lighting Door Ajar Color: Sets the color of the open door ambient lighting with the door open.
Ford: 0=Ice Blue, 1=Orange, 2=Soft Blue, 3=Red, 4=Green, 5=Blue, 6=Purple
Lincoln: 7=White, 8=Amber, 9=Teal, A=Red, B=Blue, C=Green, D=Lilac
Non-Standard: E=Yellow, F=Ice Blue

Ambient Lighting Entry Color: Sets the color when you enter/exit vehicle - independent of color selected on APIM screen.
Note: Using E or F for entry color will set ambient lighting to Ice Blue and render APIM color selection irrelevent.
Ford: 0=Ice Blue, 1=Orange, 2=Soft Blue, 3=Red, 4=Green, 5=Blue, 6=Purple
Lincoln: 7=White, 8=Amber, 9=Teal, A=Red, B=Blue, C=Green, D=Lilac
Non-Standard: E=Yellow, F=Ice Blue
